text.en: Refer to nearest Designated Microscopy Centre / NAAT (CB-NAAT) facility for two sputum samples (spot + early morning).
Counsel cough hygiene; ventilate room; mask while coughing.
List household contacts < 6 yr for IPT/TPT screening per RNTCP.

rules.rationale: RNTCP defines presumptive TB as cough >= 2 weeks (or any duration with haemoptysis/loss of weight/night sweats); two sputum samples + NAAT is the diagnostic standard.

text.en: Give the missed dose the same day if not yet bedtime; otherwise resume next scheduled dose.
Inform TB Health Visitor / Senior Treatment Supervisor; record in Nikshay.

rules.rationale: Adherence is essential to prevent MDR-TB; RNTCP mandates same-day dose recovery and Nikshay tracking.
